zh.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Berkeley於大約1133年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Sir Roger De Berkley III40歲，母親Eve de Valletort36歲。她於大約1153年與Maurice FitzRobert在英國英格蘭布里斯托結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 聖 奧古斯丁。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Berkeley was born about 1133, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Roger De Berkley III, was 40 and her mother, Eve de Valletort, was 36. She married Maurice FitzRobert about 1153, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She was buried in Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Berkeley est née environ 1133, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger De Berkley III, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Eve de Valletort, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Maurice FitzRobert environ 1153, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elleenterrée à Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Berkeley um 1133 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger De Berkley III 40 und ihre Mutter Eve de Valletort 36. Sie hat um 1153 in Bristol, England, United Kingdom Maurice FitzRobert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie wurde in Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Maurice FitzRobert circa 1153, nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Fu sepolta a Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Berkeleyが約1133年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Roger De Berkley IIIは40歳，母Eve de Valletortは36歳であった。約1153年にイギリスイギリスブリストルでMaurice FitzRobertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストル スト アウグスティンにて埋葬された。

ko.Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 스트 오구스틴
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Berkeley(이)가 대략 1133년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger De Berkley III(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve de Valletort(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1153년 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 Maurice FitzRobert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 스트 오구스틴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1133, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger De Berkley III, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Eve de Valletort, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Maurice FitzRobert aproximadamente 1153, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, E: бристол ст аугустаин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Berkeley родилась около 1133 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger De Berkley III было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve de Valletort, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maurice FitzRobert около 1153 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности бристол ст аугустаин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Maurice FitzRobert aproximadamente 1153, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
